purpose: Convert known alerts into preventive rules and future checker hooks.

rows.source_pattern: Required gate file could not be read before implementation.
rows.preventive_rule: Do not issue implementation PASS until all task gate files are readable and recorded in admission evidence.
rows.future_checker_hook: Admission checker verifies TASK_SPEC, OUTPUT_REQUIREMENTS, ACCEPTANCE_GATES, route manifest, start ACK, resolver receipt, and admission receipt are readable.

rows.source_pattern: Repository has useful legacy top-level paths outside target shape.
rows.preventive_rule: Classify legacy paths in dry-run before any migration or active authority claim.
rows.future_checker_hook: Core shape checker emits PASS_WITH_WARNINGS while legacy top-level paths remain unmapped.

rows.source_pattern: Questionable or quarantine material may be treated as truth by convenience.
rows.preventive_rule: Active use of quarantine requires explicit salvage or admission receipt.
rows.future_checker_hook: Quarantine policy checker scans declared active evidence paths for SUPPORT/QUESTIONABLE_OR_QUARANTINE.

rows.source_pattern: PowerShell quoting differs from remote shell quoting and can corrupt command payloads.
rows.preventive_rule: Prefer local script files, JSON args, or single-shell execution when crossing PowerShell to SSH boundaries.
rows.future_checker_hook: Mechanicus command wrappers flag nested shell quoting chains before remote execution.

rows.source_pattern: Remote git HTTPS push can fail on VM2 because credentials are unavailable or mismatched.
rows.preventive_rule: Treat remote push proof as pending until git ls-remote confirms the target branch head.
rows.future_checker_hook: Post-work remote closure checker compares local HEAD and origin/master after push.

rows.source_pattern: Unclassified local changes make remote route and push closure unsafe.
rows.preventive_rule: Classify pre-existing dirt before repair, then commit or explicitly block with evidence.
rows.future_checker_hook: Pre-existing dirt receipt is required before post-work bundle PASS.

rows.source_pattern: Reports edited after remote proof invalidate local-equals-origin evidence.
rows.preventive_rule: Record post-push proof only after all report writes are complete, then avoid further writes before final response.
rows.future_checker_hook: Remote closure receipt records no_write_after_remote_proof as true only after final status verification.

rows.source_pattern: Machine artifacts can drift into localized or non-UTF8 content.
rows.preventive_rule: Keep machine JSON artifacts English, UTF-8, no BOM; reserve Russian for owner-facing summaries.
rows.future_checker_hook: Language gate scans taskpack and bundle machine artifacts before PASS.
